workload.comparabilityNotes: Doe-owned apples-to-apples single-block Gemma-3-270M-shaped prefill sequence. Both sides execute the same retained inference kernels and identical buffer-write + dispatch command stream under the runtime compare harness.
workload.description: Single-block Gemma-3-270M-shaped prefill pass over 32 prompt tokens using Doe-owned retained inference kernels and seeded uniform/token buffer writes.
workload.name: gemma-3 270m shaped prefill 32tok
